regional_cost_note: Builders in Queenstown typically charge $100–$150/hr. New build costs range $3,500–$5,500/m². Queenstown’s alpine environment and high demand make it one of NZ’s most expensive building markets; book early.

businesses.name: DNA Construction Ltd
businesses.known_for: Highly reviewed residential builder in the Queenstown Lakes district covering full project delivery from design and building consent through to completion.

businesses.name: Fixation Builders
businesses.known_for: Registered Master Builders and Licensed Building Practitioners specialising in new builds, renovations, roofing, and staircases; 2024 Master Builders House of the Year winner at Jack’s Point.

businesses.name: Peakside Builders Ltd
businesses.known_for: Licensed Building Practitioner with 20+ years of industry experience offering new builds, renovations, extensions, kitchens & bathrooms, and decks.
